notes: Bare-bones Donkey Kong attempt with major issues: barrels spawn from wrong location and don't follow platform logic correctly, climbing is unreliable, platforms use a broken color value ('#44FF'), the game is barely recognizable visually with no proper sprites, and the win condition (reach y<100 and x>200) is nearly impossible given the layout.

The build runs and basic movement/jumping/climbing exist, but core Donkey Kong behavior is heavily simplified and inaccurate, with questionable barrel logic, rough collision/state handling, and only a loose visual resemblance to the original game.
